scripts.clean: rm -rf dist .nx .cache node_modules/.vite node_modules/.esbuild tmp && find . -path '*/node_modules' -prune -o -type d -name '.cache' -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null && find . -type f -name 'tsconfig*.tsbuildinfo' ! -path '*/node_modules/*' -delete && find . -type d -name 'dist' ! -path '*/node_modules/*' -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null && find . -type d -name 'coverage' ! -path '*/node_modules/*' -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; echo 'Cleaned artifacts, caches, and build outputs'
scripts.post:report: pnpm clean && nx reset && nx sync && (pnpm run format && pnpm run lint:fix) && nx run-many --target=check-types --all --parallel=false && pnpm -r --filter='!eslint-config' --filter='!typescript-config' run test:coverage
scripts.post:report:fast: pnpm run lint:fix:fast && nx run-many --target=check-types --all --parallel --outputStyle=static && pnpm -r --filter='!eslint-config' --filter='!typescript-config' run test:coverage
